history.prompt: 9:16 vertical,10s vertical commercial wig video,3 reference images as key frames,1080P photorealistic,soft studio fill light,clean light gray background,Shopify hair ad style.Fully retain reference details:model face,ombre gradient hair color,hairline,curl density,hair volume,real human hair texture,hair length unchanged.10s timeline shot logic:0-3s front close-up,model slowly turn front to 45°side,hands gently comb top & side hair,fingers tug roots to let curls bounce,slow slight push camera;3-7s full side shot,show side curl volume,fingers stroke curls to display softness with natural bounce;7-10s back view,show full rear layered curls,slightly lift hair,slow pull-back camera,shallow depth of field.Real skin texture,natural finger motion,clear hair strand luster,soft shadow,smooth frame transition,60fps smooth motion.ugly,distorted face/fingers,plastic fake wig shine,hair discoloration,twisted hairline,messy background,overexposure,blurry,low res,cartoon,anime,3D render,AI distortion,stiff rigid hair/robotic movement,broken patchy hair,frame color flicker,text,logo,watermark
